name: Ameresco, Inc.
business: Ameresco is a leading energy infrastructure solutions provider dedicated to helping customers reduce costs, enhance resilience, and decarbonize to net zero in the global energy transition. Our comprehensive portfolio includes implementing smart energy efficiency solutions, upgrading aging infrastructure, and developing, constructing, and operating distributed energy resources. We work with customers on both sides of the meter to reduce operating expenses, upgrade and maintain facilities, stabilize energy costs, improve occupancy comfort levels, increase energy reliability and enhance the environment.
sellsTo: commercial and industrial customers across North America and Europe

exposures.sentence: We have constructed and are currently developing, designing, and constructing a wide range of renewable energy plants using biogas (generated from landfills, wastewater treatment plants, and the agricultural sector) advanced biofuels biomass and other bio-derived fuels solar PV wind and hydro sources of energy battery storage

We have constructed and are currently developing, designing, and constructing a wide range of renewable energy plants using biogas (generated from landfills, wastewater treatment plants, and the agricultural sector) advanced biofuels biomass and other bio-derived fuels solar PV wind and hydro sources of energy battery storage
Our portfolio includes ... Microgrids Advanced Metering Infrastructure ( AMI ) Utility Distribution System Software and Services

Ameresco helps its customers by reducing energy use and delivering energy infrastructure solutions to Federal, state and local governments, utilities, data centers, educational and healthcare institutions, housing authorities, and commercial and industrial customers across North America and Europe.

catalysts.event: Finalization of three SCE battery energy storage system projects expected this year
catalysts.sentence: We expect all three projects to be finalized this year.

catalysts.event: Planned capital investments of $300M-$350M in 2026 for renewable energy plants
catalysts.sentence: We currently plan to invest approximately $300.0 million to $350.0 million in capital investments in 2026, principally for the construction or acquisition of new renewable energy plants.

catalysts.event: Planned additional financings of $250M-$300M in 2026 to fund renewable energy plants
catalysts.sentence: We currently plan additional financings of $250.0 million to $300.0 million in 2026 to fund the construction or acquisition of new renewable energy plants as discussed above.

catalysts.event: Joinder agreement executed to move two projects under October 2022 Financing Facility
catalysts.sentence: On February 3, 2026, a joinder agreement was executed with reference to the construction and development loan agreement, dated August 18, 2023, and two projects were moved under this October 2022 Financing Facility.
